title: 第 7 節
en: Vedic Hymns, S. B. E., vol. xlvi, p. 12.
sun, or Indra and Havirdhane (waggons Vayu).
Devi ur^ahuti (the two VipaiMutudri (the two food-giving god- rivers, Vipas and desses, Heaven and Sutudri).
Earth, Day and Artni (the two ends of Night, Autumn and a bow).

It is clear that these so-called deities were put together by Yaska without much system. Those from 29 to 36, however, are classed together as Dvandva or dual deities, and some, such as the Three Goddesses (Agnayi, PWthivi, and Ilk, or Bharati, Ilk, and Sarasvati), are classed together as the wives of Agni.
In what sense these 36 Devatas may be regarded as deities may easily be seen from any of the invocations addressed to them. Thus the Artnis, the two ends of a bow, are praised in Rv. VI, 75, 4: —
' The two ends of the bow darting asunder of one accord may strike away the enemies, the fiends.'
The bow is praised in the Rv. VI, 75, 2 : —
' Let us win cows with the bow, let us win the race with the bow, let us win hard battles with the bow ; the bow does injury to the enemy, let us win all countries with the bow ! '
The bowstring is praised in Rv. VI, 75, 3 : —

伊舒提（弓箭袋）。
阿拉瓦亞尼（森林精靈）、哈斯塔格納（臂環精靈）。

吠陀讚歌，《東方聖典叢書》（S. B. E.），第四十六卷，第十二頁。

很明顯，這些所謂的神祇是由亞斯卡（Yaska）毫無太多系統地匯聚而成的。不過，第二十九至三十六項則被分類為雙偶神（Dvandva）或配對神祇，而某些神祇，例如三位女神（阿格尼依（Agnayi）、普里提維（Prithivi）及依拉（Ilk），或婆羅多（Bharati）、依拉（Ilk）及莎羅斯瓦蒂（Sarasvati）），則被分類為阿格尼（Agni）的妻子。
這 36 位提婆如何可被視為神祇，從任何對他們的祈禱文中都可輕易看出。因此，弧的兩端——阿特尼斯（Artnis），在《梨俱吠陀》第六卷第 75 讚第 4 頌中受到讚美：—
「弓之兩端協力射出，可以擊退敵人與魔鬼。」
梨俱吠陀第六卷第七十五頌第二句讚頌弓矢 —
「讓我們用弓贏得牛群，讓我們用弓贏得競賽，讓我們用弓贏得艱難的戰役；弓對敵人造成傷害，讓我們用弓贏得所有國家！」
弓弦在《梨俱吠陀》VI, 75, 3 中受到讚頌：—
